error_signature: Response body is not valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON response from HTTP Request node
symptom: When configuring the HTTP Request node to format the response as JSON, an error occurs stating 'Response body is not valid JSON'.
not_this_if: Response format is set to Text
root_cause: The error occurs because the response from the HTTP request is not in valid JSON format, which can happen if the API endpoint returns an error message or a different content type instead of the expected JSON structure.
fix_steps: Add an Edit Fields node after the HTTP Request node
Set a field called 'title' with the expression: `{{ $json.data.parseJson().results.bindings[0].title.value }}`
Save the workflow and re-execute it.
agent_instruction: Add an Edit Fields node to extract the title from the JSON response.
